falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is SUPPORTED if corporate investment elasticity to the effective marginal tax rate falls inside the NK canonical range (≈ -0.1 to -0.3) rather than the supply-side range (≤ -0.5), AND if cumulative real-GDP deviation from pre-TCJA trend over 2018-2019 (pre-COVID) is less than 1 percentage point. REFUTED if elasticity exceeds -0.5 in absolute value or if cumulative GDP gain exceeds 2.5 percentage points over trend.

variables_loaded.name: tcja_post_2017q4_indicator
variables_loaded.source: constructed: indicator = 1 for quarters >= 2017Q4 (TCJA enactment Dec 2017).

variables_loaded.name: effective_marginal_corporate_tax_rate
variables_loaded.source: constructed: hand-coded EMTR (Devereux-Griffith methodology) US corporate, pre-vs-post-TCJA. Treasury OTA + Tax Foundation cross-reference.
